tagline: Kitchen, bathroom & outdoor living remodels — Celina, Frisco & North DFW

faq.q: How long does a kitchen remodel take?
faq.a: A full kitchen remodel typically takes 4-8 weeks depending on scope. A cosmetic refresh (countertops, backsplash, paint) is usually 1-2 weeks. We'll give you a detailed timeline in your free estimate.
Yes. We offer free in-home estimates for all projects. Carlos or Miguel will visit your home, measure the space, discuss your vision, and provide a written Good/Better/Best estimate within 48 hours.

faq.q: Are you licensed and insured in Texas?
faq.a: Yes. Crestview Remodeling is licensed in Texas and carries general liability insurance plus workers' comp. We pull all required permits. (Demo site.)
We primarily serve Celina, Frisco, Prosper, McKinney, and Allen. We also take select projects in Gunter, Anna, and Sherman for larger renovations.

faq.q: Do you offer payment plans or financing?
faq.a: Yes. We offer 12-month same-as-cash financing through GreenSky for projects over $5,000. We also accept milestone billing.
